title: Deltarune Tools
description: Adds common items from game DELTARUNE.
body:
This mod adds common items from game DELTARUNE, like healing items (food), swords, axes, scarves, rings, and TP system (spell system), and music discs.

Rarer food items can give effects.

Most swords can improve damage output at the early stage of game. The better the sword, the harder its recipe.
You can gain TP by standing near hostile mobs, attacking and killing any mobs.
If you hold any Axe, you can cast Rude Buster spell by the cost of 50 TP. It fires a projectile that deals damage on impact.
If you hold any Scarf, you can cast Heal Prayer spell by the cost of 32 TP. It heals player based on used Scarf.

If you hold Snow/Freeze Ring, you can cast Ice Shock by the cost of 16 TP. It fires a projectile that deals a little damage, and slows the entity it hits (Freeze Ring locks them in place for several seconds)
If you hold Thorn Ring, you can cast Snowgrave by the cost of 100 TP. It fires a projectile that locks entity in place, and creates a 3x3x3 ice cube around them, dealing large amount of damage.

Some items like Kromer and card suits cannot be obtained through crafting. Kromer can be bought from Wandering Trader, and card suits spawn in new structure.
